title: alangium barbatum
intro: Alangium barbatum, also known as the Indian alangium or alangium, is a plant species belonging to the family Cornaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Alangium barbatum has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
